name: esm-codex-workflows
description: Reusable ESM sports-media Codex workflows for player compilations, IG carousels, Facebook discussion posts, news rewrites, and WordPress drafts.

interface.shortDescription: Run ESM-style sports content workflows from simple prompts.
interface.longDescription: Adds reusable Codex skills, references, templates, and scripts for ESM-style MLB/NFL player compilations, Instagram carousel planning, Facebook discussion posts, news rewrites, and WordPress draft workflows. Private credentials, logged-in sessions, paid services, and local memory are not included.
